ccel.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

source.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works
NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

verses.text: You owe me a good turn.
For I lent you a kindness, which I ought to get back with interest;—a kind of interest, this, which our Lord does not refuse.
Pay me, then, my friend, by paying me a visit.
So much for the capital; what of the increment?
It is the fact of the visit being paid by you, who are a man as much superior to me, as fathers are better than children.
